2025/26 Season

Fixtures

GW35 — Upcoming matchups

Matches of the Week · GW35
Featured Match

Coronation, Or Spoiler?

Home
skoeiboy
15–19 · 2733 pts
vs
Away
erozier
22–12 · 3232 pts

erozier comes in two games clear at 22-12 with a chance to make the rest of the season academic. A win here pushes the lead toward mathematically uncatchable, and the title race effectively closes with three weeks left. skoeiboy sits at 15-19 with nothing to play for except spoiling the script, but he showed the ceiling is there last week with a 106.5 against Flabiano9. Big underdog, but a stunning upset would be the kind of result that re-opens the door for the chasing pack.

Featured Match

brendog2814 Defends Second

Home
brendog2814
20–14 · 3026 pts
vs
Away
cstoney20
14–20 · 2776 pts

After his 118.75-point GW34 lifted him into sole possession of second, brendog2814 needs to keep winning. JordiCarb (20-14, 2,815 PF) and Noahvillasana17 (20-14, 2,793 PF) are right behind on tiebreakers and both have favorable matchups this week. cstoney20 has been a bottom-half team most of the year but pulled the upset over Noahvillasana17 two weeks ago with 104.5. A loss here doesn't just hurt brendog2814's record, it cracks the runner-up race wide open.
